title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Tata Elxsi

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Tata Elxsi
jsonLd.description:
Tata Elxsi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Elxsi:
Tata Elxsi is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Elxsi!
